meta.title: Vidal Djona Fopa – Mechatronics Student & Mechanic
meta.description: Portfolio of Vidal Djona Fopa: Mechatronics student at Hochschule München, automotive/commercial vehicle mechanic and founder of a GPS tracking startup.

hero.name: Vidal Djona Fopa
hero.tagline: From automotive mechanics in Cameroon to mechatronics in Munich — precise, reliable, and genuinely invested in people and machines.

about.title: About me
about.text: I was born on May 10, 1998 in Kribi, Cameroon. In 2017 I completed my Abitur with a focus on automotive mechanics, and in 2020 I earned my Bachelor's in Technology, specializing in automotive mechatronics, in my home country. Since October 2025 I've been studying Mechatronics at Hochschule München; from October 2025 to February 2026 I also worked as a recruit on the MunichMotorSport Electrical Team on sensor-to-microcontroller communication.

items.description: Advising customers and carrying out bicycle repairs.
items.context: Bicycle shop chain with three locations in Munich (Schwabing, Neuhausen, Haidhausen).

items.description: Working on sensor-to-STM32-microcontroller communication and the CAN network of the race car.
items.context: Official Formula Student team of Hochschule München, racing since 2005.

items.description: Bachelor's degree in Mechatronics with a focus on electronics, control systems and mechanical engineering.
Fully assembling e-bikes, installing software, and checking for mechanical defects.
items.context: Manufacturer of e-bike drive systems and batteries, based in Maisach near Munich.

items.description: Intensive German course to reach language proficiency level C1.
On-site planning and deployment, customer service and acquisition of new contracts in GPS tracking systems.
Diagnosis, inspection, repair and replacement of components on trucks and construction machinery.
items.context: Cameroonian-French company with over 10 years of experience maintaining heavy-duty and construction machinery.

items.description: Pneumatic and lighting work on garbage trucks, plus bleeding and inspecting hydraulic circuits.
items.context: Cameroon's largest waste management company, founded in 1969, operating in 17 cities.

items.degree: 3D Modeling with Onshape – Onshape Associate Certificate (in progress)

items.institution: Institut Universitaire des Technologies Fotso Victor

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Interested in working together, or just have a question? I'd love to hear from you.
